scope: P23 pre-implementation plan review for src/workflow/requirement-intake.js below-500 extraction

non_blocking_notes.summary: `src/workflow/requirement-intake-core.js` is estimated around 285-300 lines, near the 300-line warning boundary but below the 500-line hard threshold.
`WORKBENCH_REQUIREMENT_INTAKE_VERSION` is a current public export and should be explicitly re-exported from the compatibility root entry.
Small normalization helpers are duplicated across existing requirement plan modules and the planned core module; this is pre-existing duplication and not a blocker for P23.
`validateRequirementSubmission` is currently tested indirectly through submission behavior; a direct unit test would strengthen extraction confidence but is not required for parity.

planned_modules.src/workflow/requirement-intake-core.js: constants, surface profiles, shared normalization/profile/id/summary helpers, plan review constructors, work package helpers, item normalization, closed-status helpers

plan_inventory.public_surface_requirement: src/workflow/requirement-intake.js remains the compatibility re-export entry for all current public exports.
